title: phyllanthus jablonskianus
intro: Phyllanthus jablonskianus, also known as the Jablonskia plant or Phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to Sri Lanka and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney disorders, and aiding in the treatment of diabetes and certain types of cancer. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
